entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop (Zea mays L.) studied for yield responses to tillage and mulching

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: A legume crop (Vigna unguiculata (Walp) L.) used in rotation and studied for yield

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop (Sorghum bicolor L. (Moench)) used in rotation and studied for yield

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: SEMI-ARID CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions characterized by low and irregular rainfall

entities.name: CONSERVATION AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An approach to increase productivity in smallholder agro-ecosystems through sustainable soil and crop management

entities.name: REDUCED TILLAGE
entities.description: A farming practice that minimizes soil disturbance to improve soil health

entities.name: MULCHING
entities.description: The application of organic material to the soil surface to conserve moisture and suppress weeds

entities.name: CROP ROTATION
entities.description: The practice of growing different crops in succession on the same land to improve soil fertility and break pest cycles

entities.name: RIPPING
entities.description: A specific conservation tillage method involving deep soil loosening

entities.name: PLANTING BASINS
entities.description: A specific conservation tillage method involving the creation of basins for planting

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL MOULDBOARD PLOUGHING
entities.description: A traditional tillage method used as a control in the study

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: The amount of precipitation, which significantly influences crop yield in semi-arid regions

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: The water content of the soil, which affects the response of crops to tillage and mulching
